mapper.sql: id, title, amount, coupon_deductible, quantity, status, valid_start_date, valid_end_date, study_duration, study_duration_unit, description, card_code_length, secret_code_length, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT sc.id, sc.title, sc.quantity, sc.amount, sc.valid_start_date, sc.valid_end_date, sc.study_duration, sc.study_duration_unit, sc.status, sc.create_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edu_study_card_course scc WHERE scc.card_id = sc.id) AS course_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edu_study_card_instance sci WHERE sci.card_id = sc.id AND sci.status = 1) AS used_count FROM edu_study_card sc WHERE sc.deleted = 0
AND sc.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.title}, '%')
AND sc.status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY sc.id DESC
SELECT FROM edu_study_card WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_study_card (title, amount, coupon_deductible, quantity, status, valid_start_date, valid_end_date, study_duration, study_duration_unit, description, card_code_length, secret_code_length, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{amount}, #{couponDeductible}, #{quantity}, #{status}, #{validStartDate}, #{validEndDate}, #{studyDuration}, #{studyDurationUnit}, #{description}, #{cardCodeLength}, #{secretCodeLength}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_study_card SET title = #{title}, amount = #{amount}, coupon_deductible = #{couponDeductible}, quantity = #{quantity}, status = #{status}, valid_start_date = #{validStartDate}, valid_end_date = #{validEndDate}, study_duration = #{studyDuration}, study_duration_unit = #{studyDurationUnit}, description = #{description}, card_code_length = #{cardCodeLength}, secret_code_length = #{secretCodeLength}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_study_card SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_study_card SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, title FROM edu_study_card WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
